Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to merge two event logs Log A and Log B into a single integrated event log

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now I need to match events based on order id and timing within 2 seconds tolerance

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Received Log A 10 00 00 vs OrderReceived Log B 09 59 58 Time difference 2 seconds exactly at the tolerance threshold Both are the initial order event with matching order id Merge Yes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Validated Log A 10 01 30 vs OrderValidation Log B 10 01 29 Time difference 1 second Both represent order validation Merge Yes

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Payment Processed Log A 10 02 00 vs PaymentCheck Log B 10 02 05 Time difference 5 seconds which exceeds the 2 second tolerance However they are semantically equivalent events in the payment phase

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - NE
Text: Ill merge despite the timing gap since no other payment events exist in either log Merge Yes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Shipped Log A 10 05 00 vs Shipping Log B 10 05 02 Time difference 2 seconds Both represent the shipment event Merge Yes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Delivered Log A 10 20 00 vs No corresponding event in Log B Keep as is

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Check Log B 10 03 00 No match in Log A Keep as is

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ill create a merged log with events sorted chronologically combining attributes from both sources where applicable
